summary: Comprehensive testing of POS major UI updates - iteration 5. All features working. Backend: 57/57 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI flows verified including full-screen cart, product search popup, per-item price modes, currency toggle, shop order lookup, and admin transfers page.
passed_tests: POS /pos - full-screen cart table layout with columns: #, 商品名称, 数量, 价格类型, 单价, 金额 ✓
POS /pos - search bar typing opens product search popup ✓
POS /pos - '商品' button triggers product search popup ✓
POS /pos - product search popup has category tabs (全部, 电子产品, etc.) ✓
POS /pos - clicking product in popup adds to cart ✓
POS /pos - per-item price up/down arrows cycle through 价格1→价格2→整箱→价格1 ✓
POS /pos - box mode shows calculation detail (e.g., 1×$12.00=$12.00) ✓
POS /pos - currency toggle in header with ↑↓ arrows switches between $ and Bs. ✓
POS /pos - Bs. mode shows all prices converted (e.g., Bs.6510.00) ✓
POS /pos - cart total updates correctly when switching price modes ✓
Shop /shop/orders - order lookup by order_no shows items with product_name, product_code, quantity, unit_price, amount ✓
Shop /shop/orders - order lookup by phone works correctly ✓
Admin /admin/transfers - TransferPage loads with transfer form and inventory overview ✓
Admin /admin/transfers - sidebar link '调货管理' visible and clickable ✓
Admin /admin/transfers - inventory overview shows products across warehouses ✓
Admin /admin/transfers - transfer logs section shows history ✓
GET /api/products - returns products with price1/price2/price3/box_quantity fields ✓
GET /api/categories - returns categories for popup tabs ✓
GET /api/exchange-rates - returns usd_to_ves rate (434) ✓
GET /api/shop/order-lookup - returns orders with product details ✓
GET /api/warehouses - returns warehouses with main warehouse ✓
GET /api/transfer-logs - returns transfer history ✓
GET /api/inventory - returns inventory records ✓
GET /api/stores - returns retail stores for POS selection ✓

features_verified.pos_full_screen_cart: Working - Full-screen table layout with columns: #, 商品名称, 数量, 价格类型, 单价, 金额
features_verified.pos_product_search_popup: Working - Opens on typing or clicking '商品' button, has category tabs, products clickable to add
features_verified.pos_per_item_price_mode: Working - Each cart item has up/down chevrons to cycle 价格1→价格2→整箱→价格1
features_verified.pos_box_calculation: Working - Shows 'X×$price=$amount' when box mode selected
features_verified.pos_currency_toggle: Working - Header ↑↓ arrows switch between $ and Bs., converts all prices
features_verified.shop_order_lookup: Working - Shows product_name, product_code, quantity, unit_price, amount for items
features_verified.admin_transfers_page: Working - Transfer form, inventory overview table, transfer logs

seed_data_creation: Test order ON2026031301245418A9 with phone 04121234567 exists. MRG001 product (利率测试商品) with cost=10, p1=15, p2=13, p3=12 exists.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All POS UI major updates tested and working: (1) Full-screen cart table layout replaces split layout, (2) Product search popup opens via typing in search bar or clicking '商品' button - has category tabs, (3) Per-item price mode with up/down chevron arrows cycling price1→price2→box→price1, (4) Currency toggle in header with ↑↓ arrows switches between $ and Bs. and converts all prices, (5) Box mode shows calculation e.g. '1×$12.00=$12.00', (6) Shop order lookup at /shop/orders shows full item details, (7) Admin transfers at /admin/transfers working with form and inventory overview. Exchange rate is ~434 usd_to_ves. Warehouses: 总部仓库 (main), 测试仓库. Test stores: 测试门店, Tienda Principal, Tienda Central.
